item.title: Bard-Shell: Introduction
item.description: Bard-Shell: A Tool for Sending Linux Command Outputs to Bard.

item.title: Recursive Backtracking
item.description: Recursive Backtracking Algorithm Basic Idea This is a simple depth-first search Algorithm, which can generate mazes by carving walls between adjacent cells randomly, and Backtracking when it reaches a dead end.

item.title: MicroMouse
item.description: MicroMouse Context So I saw this awesome video on Veritasium’s channel today and was totally fascinated by the different techniques used by the MicroMouse competition winners to make you solve this simple yet awesome problem.

item.title: Inspiration
item.description: My Inspirations Sebastian Lague Code Bullet Michael Reeves ThinMatrix

item.title: Advent of Code
item.description: So I recently came across this website called Advent Of Code (github), and its awesome!

item.title: Programs I Use
item.description: File Managers ranger nautilus (gnome’s file manager) Browsers brave qutebrowser surf Youtube ytfzf youtube-dl Anime ani-cli Feed newsboat Editors neovim neovide vim Run Launchers rofi dmenu (also for scripts) ulauncher (when in gnome) Terminals alacritty st kitty Image Viewers sxiv ueberzug System Monitors bpytop htop System Info fastfetch neofetch pfetch Music mpd mpc mpv ncmpcpp playerctl (Awesome program check it out) Torrent and Downloads aria2c wget curl

item.title: Newsboat is Awesome!!
item.description: What is Newsboat I Recently came across a program called newsboat , which is an rss feed reader.

item.title: Automating the blog making process
item.description: The problem Whenever I need to make a blog, i need to go in the hugo directory, make a new file with hugo new , and also update the repo after that.

item.title: First Blog - Pup
item.description: What I learned today Today I came across a fantastic tool called pup.

item.title: Kshitij's website
item.description: What this website is about This website is about the things I do as a programmer, gamedevloper, and AI Developer
